A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
Although the Mongo query returned many businesses with WiFi marked as "u'free'" and descriptions containing U.S. state abbreviations (e.g., "King of Prussia, PA"), the execute_python step erroneously filtered everything out (printing []), so the agent incorrectly concluded no qualifying businesses existed and returned "Unable to determine."

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
